description: Allowed operator actions per control plane with override rules and constraints.

actions.description: Initialize a new run with a RunContext, transitioning to QUEUED state.
constraints: RunContext must be valid and normalized

actions.description: Stop a running run, transitioning to FAILED state with reason.
constraints: Run must be in RUNNING or GATED state

actions.description: Pause a running run, transitioning to PAUSED state.
constraints: Run must be in RUNNING state

actions.description: Resume a paused run, transitioning back to RUNNING state.
constraints: Run must be in PAUSED state

actions.description: Rerun a previously completed or failed stage with a new attempt_id.
constraints: Stage must be in PASS or FAIL state
New attempt_id required
Prior attempt_ref must be recorded

actions.description: Approve a gate override with scope, expiry, and reason.
constraints: Gate must not be in the never-overridable list
Override must have expiry date
Override scope must be explicit
Approver identity required

actions.description: Change version pins for registries (standards, templates, gates, schemas, toolchain).
constraints: Run must be in QUEUED state (pins frozen at run start)
Pin change triggers re-resolution

actions.description: Release a completed run's kit bundle for distribution.
constraints: All required stages must be PASS
All gates must be PASS
Run must be in RELEASED state

actions.description: Start kit execution, transitioning kit from READY to EXECUTING state.
constraints: Kit must be validated
Kit must be in READY state

actions.description: Pause kit execution, transitioning to PAUSED state.
constraints: Kit must be in EXECUTING state

actions.description: Resume paused kit execution, transitioning to RESUMING then EXECUTING.
constraints: Kit must be in PAUSED state

actions.description: Start a maintenance run, transitioning from PLANNED to APPLYING state.
constraints: MaintenanceIntent must be valid
ScopeConstraints must be defined

actions.description: Stop a maintenance run and trigger rollback if applicable.
constraints: Run must be in APPLYING or VERIFYING state

actions.description: Approve a breaking change or scope expansion during maintenance.
constraints: Override must have explicit scope
Breaking change acknowledgment required
